description_long: This object is a wooden guard rail composed of three horizontal planks evenly spaced and supported by two vertical posts. The wood has a smooth, slightly glossy finish, with a natural light brown color and visible grain patterns. The ends of the horizontal rails are blunt and extend slightly past the vertical posts, giving the structure a simple, utilitarian appearance. There are no visible fasteners or decorative elements, and the construction appears sturdy and functional. The guard rail is likely intended for use in parks, sidewalks, or low-traffic urban areas to demarcate boundaries or prevent passage. The overall design is minimalistic, focusing on practicality and durability.
description: A simple wooden guard rail with three horizontal planks and two vertical posts, finished in a light brown wood tone. The structure is sturdy and utilitarian, suitable for urban or park settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing three evenly spaced horizontal wooden planks supported by two vertical posts.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the guard rail and the alignment of the planks.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the same three horizontal planks and two posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the arrangement of the planks.
